what: Validate content is not generic AI-generated boilerplate
why: Knowledge should contain domain-specific expertise that AI wouldn't produce on its own

output.console: Originality assessment with specificity score and heuristic results

success_handling.criteria: Content passes originality heuristics: contains specific examples, project-specific terms, concrete details, and non-generic patterns

error_handling.scenario: Content appears to be generic AI boilerplate
error_handling.criteria: Content scores below originality thresholds on heuristic checks (low specificity, no project-specific terms, generic patterns)
error_handling.action: Record originality concern as audit finding, continue to generate final result

event.message: Content may be generic AI boilerplate for entry {entry_id}: {originality_issues}

decisions.outcome: Record findings, proceed to generate-audit-result step

decisions.decision: Use heuristics (specificity, concrete examples, project-specific terms) not AI detection
decisions.rationale: AI detection models are unreliable and produce false positives; heuristic checks for specificity and domain relevance are more actionable
